backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (InventoryItem, Transaction, ShopSettings, etc.) and backend logic for shop settings, inventory management, and transactions with persistent state maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: using item ID as stable key during Excel import (upsert behavior) and renaming import/export buttons to 'Unggah'/'Unduh' in InventoryPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes of every component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and other design tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings), wraps the app in a dark ThemeProvider, and renders a persistent Sidebar layout.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Forwardref receipt component that renders a print-friendly transaction receipt in Indonesian, including shop logo/info, item list, subtotal, discount, and total.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark navy sidebar component with five navigation links in Indonesian (Kasir, Inventori, Transaksi, Laporan, Pengaturan) that highlights the active route.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including shop settings, inventory items, and transactions via the canister actor. Covers CRUD operations for inventory and transaction creation/retrieval.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including sidebar and brand colors. Also includes print styles for an 80mm receipt layout.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging (cn), Indonesian Rupiah currency formatting, date/time formatting from nanosecond timestamps, and date-to-nanosecond conversions.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using browser-native CompressionStream/DecompressionStream for raw DEFLATE compression inside a ZIP container. Builds valid .xlsx files from sheet data and can parse them back.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page that lets users search inventory, manage a shopping cart, apply discounts, and complete checkout by creating a transaction and updating inventory quantities. Displays a printable receipt dialog after successful checkout.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with CRUD dialogs for items, search/filter, and Excel import/export functionality using ID-based matching for updates.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, fetching data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing users to update shop name, address, phone, thank-you message, and upload a logo with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search/date filters, detail view dialog, print receipt support, and delete confirmation for transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (oklch-based), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending requests, specifically Excel import ID-based matching and button label renames for the Inventory page.
